name: Fashion Legends
author: Poki
description: Fashion Legends is a dress-up game where you collect your clothes as you walk! Walk your character over a long catwalk filled with clothes and gems. Make sure to pick up the right clothes for the assignment that you see on the top of your screen. Dress up as a princess, your favorite character from a movie or series, in pajamas or as a Duck? You can find gems along the way that you can collect. At the end you can do upgrades to receive extra likes or gems. Unlock new skins and themes as you play. Are you ready to dress-up? How to play Fashion Legends? Drag left/right to move (desktop: A/D or Arrow Keys). Who created Fashion Legends? Fashion Legends is created by Jungle Tavern. This is their third game on Poki! Play their other games on Poki: Count Control Legends and Neon Challenge Legends ! How can I play Fashion Legends for free? You can play Count Control Legends for free on Poki. Can I play Fashionl Legends on mobile devices and desktop? Fashion Legends can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
